THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER U.S. WATER SERVICES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, TYLER B. $6,750.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,750.00, PLUS INTEREST AT 10% - SEE SCANNED DOC
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR (TRANSACTION ID # 17142027) FILED BY PETITIONER U.S. WATER SERVICES, INC.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER U.S. WATER SERVICES, INC.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM FINAL ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR JUDGMENT THEREON IS GRANTED. THE PARTIES FILED A STIPULATION THAT THE ARBITRATION AWARD SHOULD BE CONFIRMED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

calendar.matters:
Petitioners Notice Of Hearing To Confirm Final Arbitration Award And For Judgment Thereon
Off Calendar Jun-05-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. R. BRIAN IRION, TEL. NO. 1-650-363-2600 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER U.S. WATER SERVICES, INC.'S Petition To Confirm Final Arbitration Award And For Judgment Thereon is GRANTED. The parties filed a stipulation that the arbitration award should be confirmed. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 =302/hk
